name: redwire-operator-gateway
description: Operator backend gateway: holds the Redwire API key server-side, proxies poster-safe endpoints for the static storefront, and can optionally run the Discord bot in the same process.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/proxy.js && node --check src/bot/index.js && echo 'syntax ok'
